items.speaker: Onlooking Fisherman
items.text: You're back. I've been keeping a close eye on her, just in case she gets any... wild ideas about hurting anyone.

items.speaker: Onlooking Fisherman
items.text: Funny enough, she's been holding it together. It's like she really has been waiting on you.

items.speaker: Dana
items.text: You're finally back! Now I won't ever go hungry again! You must be exhausted from that trip, I'll prepare something for you to eat!

items.speaker: Unknown (83)
items.text: Dana takes the fish and quietly begins to skin it with her bare hands.

items.speaker: Onlooking Fisherman
items.text: She's starting to lose her grip again. But now that you're back, no offense, but I'll be taking my leave... Good luck.

options.text: Hold on, do you know any of the people she talked about?

items.speaker: Onlooking Fisherman
items.text: Those fancy Mister and Madam types? Ha! You think I know any toffee-nosed snobs like that? You might try asking Ahab, he knows just about everyone!

items.speaker: Unknown (83)
items.text: Dana serves up a plate piled high with messy fish pieces. She gazes at you like she's serving a feast.

options.text: How about we go to Madam Claire's first, Dana?

items.speaker: Dana
items.text: Oh, she wants to see us? Well, what are we waiting for? Let's go!

items.speaker: Dana
items.text: No, stop. Don't eat me. Get off! Get off me!

items.speaker: Dana
items.text: Why are there so many? Ack! My legs... My arms... You're not taking me too!

items.speaker: Unknown (83)
items.text: Dana swings her arms wildly trying to dodge you, as if she's in the water.

items.speaker: Dana
items.text: Ah. {Male=Brother;Female=Sister}... How are you...? I saw you were... I saw it with my own eyes...

options.text: I've found the fish. We should go back.

items.speaker: Dana
items.text: So you managed to escape from all those fish. Not only that, you also found your favorite fish!

items.speaker: Dana
items.text: Yes, yes. Now that we have everything we want, it's time to return home and enjoy their beauty together.

items.speaker: Dana
items.text: Haha... Haha... You... You'll be a better collector than I'll ever be once we're back... I'm so thrilled for you!

items.speaker: Dana
items.text: The wind is too strong! We're taking on water, {Male=brother;Female=sister}. I need your help!

items.speaker: Unknown (83)
items.text: Dana stamps her feet impatiently, her empty hands seeming to tug at something invisible.

options.text: I found the fish you're looking for.

items.speaker: Dana
items.text: A new fish! A fish no one's ever laid eyes on! Oh, don't you dare die on me now. I won't let you rot away...

items.speaker: Dana
items.text: Uncle Ronald. I have to find Uncle Ronald, he's the finest taxidermist I know. He'll preserve your beauty forever.

items.speaker: Unknown (83)
items.text: Dana skips away happily with the fish clutched in her hands.

items.speaker: Unknown (83)
items.text: Dana reaches out to the fish in surprise and begins stroking its scales.

items.speaker: Dana
items.text: Oh, {Male=brother;Female=sister}! I'm sorry... I'm sorry... I didn't mean to kick you into the water... They just liked your taste better...

items.speaker: Dana
items.text: I didn't want to die... You reached out to pull me in, right? It was either you or me...

items.speaker: Dana
items.text: I saw those fish first! You can't take them from me! I'm the better collector! I'm the one and only genius!

items.speaker: Dana
items.text: If I bring these back to Madam Claire, she'll let me into her salon, right? No one will ever look down on us again.

items.speaker: {PlayerName}
items.text: (Let's hope she stays in this delusion until she makes it back to the city.)
